card1.label: See the Need
card1.desc: of SME executives recognize the necessity of DX and IT adoption.

card2.label: Actually Progressing
card2.desc: Yet only a limited number of SMEs have started DX and seen results.

card3.label: Untouched / Considering
card3.desc: Many companies remain stuck without taking the first step.

problem.intro: The need is understood. But there are three insurmountable walls in the field.

items.title: Packaged products don't fit the work.
items.desc: Off-the-shelf SaaS and packaged products are built for the "average company." They don't fit the unique workflows that have been built up over years on the ground.

items.title: Initial setup requires expertise.
items.desc: The first hurdle is too high. Just reading manuals and configuring takes weeks. Executives who can't pause their core business simply don't have that time.

items.title: No one in-house can lead the way.
items.desc: Small businesses can't afford a dedicated IT department like large corporations. Without a clear leader for DX, time keeps slipping by.

problem.closingLine1: What's needed is not an off-the-shelf product.

target.label: For Whom
target.leadLine1: Small and medium-sized enterprises rooted in their communities, supporting daily operations.
target.leadLine2: Here's how AI agents work in each setting, with anticipated outcomes from deployment.

cases.pain: Is your staff's workload reaching its limit amid chronic shortages?
cases.scenario: A 30-person nursing facility. Inquiries from residents' families concentrate during the day, interrupting essential care. An AI agent handles first-line responses, logging, and staff escalation, giving caregivers their time back to focus on care.

cases.pain: Are you losing hours every day to information gaps between site and office?
cases.scenario: A 50-employee metal processing company. Office staff manually transcribed FAX orders into the system, with frequent errors and delays. An AI agent now reads FAX and email orders automatically and reflects them in the production system. Staff only verify.

cases.pain: Are you so buried in paperwork that you can't focus on real work?
cases.scenario: A 5-person tax accounting firm. Monthly receipt checks and bookkeeping consumed time, leaving no room for advisory work. An AI agent now automates receipt and invoice reading and journal entry suggestions, freeing staff to focus on review and judgment.

target.bridgeLine1: The industries differ, but the challenges are similar.
target.noteRest: Actual effects vary by business content, scale, and existing system integration. We start every project after pre-deployment hearings to understand the current state and align on targets.

solution.label: Our Approach
solution.leadLine1: From hearings to design, build, and operations — we walk with you the entire way.
solution.leadLine2: Executives don't need IT expertise. Stay focused on your core business while the field transforms.

flowSteps.title: Hearing
flowSteps.desc: We listen carefully to your current state and challenges, from a field perspective.

flowSteps.title: Workflow Analysis & Design
flowSteps.desc: What can AI automate, and how far? We propose the optimal design.

flowSteps.title: AI Agent Build
flowSteps.desc: We develop a dedicated AI agent tailored to your field's operations.

flowSteps.title: Operate & Improve
flowSteps.desc: Continuous improvement after deployment. We update as your field evolves.

pricing.noteRest2: Subsidy application support is also provided free of charge.

philosophy.label: Philosophy
philosophy.headline: Two meanings, woven into our name.

layer1.textBefore: AI agents and employees move to the same rhythm. Rather than losing work to AI, your team works alongside it and brings out its true strength.
layer1.textEm: When people and AI synchronize, the organization becomes lighter, more agile, and stronger
layer1.textAfter: . That is the field Neurosynch envisions.

layer2.textBefore: Deploying an AI agent is the start, not the goal. It learns alongside your team and continuously updates itself as your business evolves.
layer2.textEm: Your company evolves into an organization that thinks, grows, and repairs itself
layer2.textAfter: . We deliver a living system, not a one-time installation.

philosophy.statementBefore: We use the power of IT to make your company
philosophy.statementEm: an organization strong enough to win the new era

founder.label: Founder
founder.headline: Why we do this.
founder.bioP1Part1: I lived in Berlin, Germany for 17 years. I served as
founder.bioP1Em1: lead engineer on international projects at a major SIer
founder.bioP1Part2: , developing systems for companies across Europe. The industries I worked in:
founder.bioP1Part3: . I faced field challenges with teams that spoke different languages and worked in different cultures.
founder.bioP2Part1: What I came to realize: across industries and countries, the essential challenges in the field are remarkably similar.
founder.bioP2Em: "People keep doing work that people don't need to do."
founder.bioP2Part2: This holds in European corporations and in Japanese SMEs alike.
founder.bioP3: That's why I want to bring the technology and perspective I built abroad to the SMEs of Japan. Neurosynch began from that conviction.

services.label: SERVICES
services.title:
Transform your operations
with AI.
services.lead: No expensive system development required. Neurosynch accompanies you responsibly from AI agent deployment through to operational adoption.
services.service_lead: We design and build AI agents tailored to your operations, and provide consistent support through to post-deployment adoption. If you're worried about whether you can actually make AI work — that's exactly who Neurosynch is here for.
services.appeal_text: Three years with us will give you skills that keep you employable for the next ten. Hybrid development combining AI agents and web applications is the core technology that will drive SME digital transformation over the coming decade.
services.price_note: Limited to early adopters until spring 2027. Customer cost remains ¥300,000 after IT subsidy registration is complete.
services.maintenance_desc: Includes email support, bug fixes, and security updates. Feature additions and changes are quoted separately.
services.strength1_desc: We present a working prototype on the same day as your consultation.
services.strength2_desc: Our commitment doesn't end at delivery. We stay with you until full adoption.
services.strength3_desc: No hidden costs. With the IT subsidy, the effective cost is just ¥300,000.
services.strength4_desc: We visit your premises once for the initial consultation. Everything after that is remote.
services.strength5_desc: Track build progress in real time via a dedicated web page.
services.strength6_desc: Neurosynch handles the IT subsidy application paperwork on your behalf.
services.process_sub: Full deployment in as little as 26 days
services.step1_desc: On-site visit (once only). Prototype presented same day. Go/no-go decision within one week.
services.step2_desc: AI agent build. Progress published in real time on a dedicated page.
services.step4_desc: Fully remote. Operational walkthrough conducted online.
services.step5_desc: Live monitoring, immediate issue response, and outcome review. Transitions to maintenance thereafter.
services.subsidy_label: IT Subsidy compatible (Digital Transformation & AI Adoption Subsidy — from spring 2027)
services.subsidy_desc: By applying the ¥500,000 subsidy, your effective cost is just ¥300,000.

company.label: COMPANY
company.title: Company
company.lead: Neurosynch Co., Ltd. is a tech company based in Nagoya, providing AI agent deployment support.
company.mission_headline: Bringing Advanced Technology to Every SME.
company.mission_body: Our mission is to bring the benefits of AI — long enjoyed only by large enterprises — to SMEs across Nagoya and the Chubu region. We strive to create a society where every business, regardless of size, can compete with cutting-edge technology.
company.vision_headline: Start the AI-powered future of work today.
company.vision_body: By 2030, we aim to deploy AI agents in over 100 SMEs across the Chubu region, driving operational efficiency and productivity. We will carefully build workplaces where humans and AI collaborate naturally, one company at a time.
company.representative_quote: AI isn't difficult. Whether you can master it depends entirely on whether you have the right partner by your side.
company.representative_message: I founded Neurosynch because of a single experience that stayed with me. Time and again, I watched SME owners in Nagoya — who genuinely wanted to adopt AI — give up, blocked by three walls: cost, complexity, and lack of support. At the same time, large enterprises were multiplying their productivity with AI. Left unchecked, this gap will become irreversible. Through our AI Agent Onboarding Package, Neurosynch removes these walls one by one. Starting from ¥300,000. On-site visits only once. And after deployment, we stay with you — responsible and committed — until the very end. Whether you can make AI work for you is not a question of technology. It is a question of whether you have a trusted partner by your side. Neurosynch will be that partner.
company.info_business_value: AI agent deployment support / Web application development & maintenance

nagoya.label: NAGOYA
nagoya.body:
The Chubu region is one of Japan's largest economic zones, with a GDP of approximately ¥90 trillion. Built on a foundation of manufacturing led by Toyota, the region encompasses diverse industries including aerospace, logistics, and food production. Yet the small and medium-sized enterprises at the heart of this economy face three persistent challenges: chronic labour shortages, operational inefficiency, and slow digital adoption.

Nagoya sits at the geographic centre of the Japanese archipelago, placing Tokyo, Osaka, Kyoto, Hiroshima, and Fukuoka all within a few hours by Shinkansen. This strategic location makes it an ideal base for supporting SMEs across the entire country.

Neurosynch aims to deliver AI to SMEs across the Chubu region — and beyond — strengthening Japan's economy from the ground up.

careers.label: CAREERS
careers.title: Careers
careers.lead: Neurosynch is looking for engineers who are serious about transforming SME operations through AI and craftsmanship in development.
careers.no_hiring_desc: We plan to begin hiring in 2028. That said, we warmly welcome pre-registrations from anyone who resonates with Neurosynch's vision. We will contact pre-registrants first when hiring opens.
careers.philosophy_quote: Three years with us will give you skills that keep you employable for the next ten.
careers.philosophy_body: Hybrid development combining AI agents and web applications is the core technology that will drive SME digital transformation over the coming decade. We don't just build to spec — we go into the field, meet the people who use what we build, and create what is truly needed. Age, academic background, nationality, and gender are entirely irrelevant. We only look at one thing: how much can we trust you with right now.
careers.appeal_text: We want to hear from people who have felt out of place in the faceless, multi-layered subcontracting world of large SIers — people who have always believed there must be a better way than just building to spec.
careers.position_title: Senior AI Agent & Web Application Engineer
careers.position_sub: Nagoya, Aichi　|　Full-time　|　Hiring in 2028 (pre-registration open)
careers.salary_note: Age and academic background have no bearing on salary. Compensation is determined solely by the scope of work we can entrust to you.
careers.feature1: We go into the field. Everyone involved in implementation attends the initial consultation and hears directly from the people who will use what we build.
careers.feature2: No outsourcing. Everything is built in-house. We value a sense of ownership on every project.
careers.feature3: AI is used to the fullest. We use Claude Code, Cursor, Dify, and n8n to deliver high-quality systems at a pace of one per week.
careers.feature4: High autonomy. In a small team, you own the full cycle from design through delivery.
careers.req1: 3+ years of professional IT experience (development, design, or requirements definition)
careers.req2: Hands-on experience with React and TypeScript
careers.req3: Takes ownership of what they build and sees it through to the end
careers.pref1: Experience implementing AI agents or LLM APIs (Dify, n8n, LangChain, etc.)
careers.pref2: Domain knowledge in healthcare, nursing, professional services, or construction
careers.pref3: Backend development experience with Spring Boot, Node.js, or similar
careers.pref4: Infrastructure experience with AWS, Vercel, Railway, or similar
careers.pref5: Business communication experience in English or another language
careers.cond5_value: Full two-day weekends, annual paid leave, year-end holidays
careers.cond8_value: Pathway to co-founder or partner status
careers.prereg_title: Let's have a casual conversation first.
careers.prereg_desc: Hiring is planned for 2028, but we welcome pre-registrations from anyone who wants to talk now. Pre-registrants will be contacted first when hiring opens.
careers.prereg_step1: Email us with the subject line 'Pre-registration'
careers.prereg_step2: CEO Yoshiki Kuno will reply within one week
careers.prereg_step3: You will be contacted first when hiring opens in 2028

privacy.label: PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Neurosynch Co., Ltd. ("we" or "the Company") considers the protection of personal information an important responsibility and sets out this Privacy Policy accordingly.
privacy.s1_body:
We may collect the following information:
· Name, company name, email address, and enquiry content submitted via our contact form
· Access logs and cookie data generated through use of our services
privacy.s2_body:
We use collected personal information for the following purposes:
· Responding to enquiries
· Providing and improving our services
· Communicating regarding recruitment
· Complying with legal obligations
privacy.s3_body: We will not disclose personal information to third parties without your consent, except as required by law.
privacy.s4_body: We implement appropriate security measures to prevent the leakage, loss, or damage of personal information.
privacy.s5_body: Our website may use cookies to improve our services. You may disable cookies in your browser settings, though some features may become unavailable as a result.
privacy.s6_body:
For enquiries regarding our handling of personal information, please contact us at:
Neurosynch Co., Ltd.
2-13 Higashi Matabee-cho, Minami-ku, Nagoya, Aichi 457-0833
info@neurosynch.co.jp
